en: OF DAVID, WHEN HE CHANGED HIS BEHAVIOR BEFORE ABIMELECH, SO THAT HE DROVE HIM OUT, AND HE WENT AWAY. I will bless the LORD at all times; his praise shall continually be in my mouth.
zh: 我要時常稱頌耶和華， 讚美他的話必常在我口中。

en: My soul makes its boast in the LORD; let the humble hear and be glad.
zh: 我的心要因耶和華誇耀， 困苦的人聽見了就喜樂。

en: Oh, magnify the LORD with me, and let us exalt his name together!
zh: 你們要跟我一起尊耶和華為大， 我們來一同高舉他的名。

en: I sought the LORD, and he answered me and delivered me from all my fears.
zh: 我曾求問耶和華，他應允了我， 救我脫離一切恐懼。

en: Those who look to him are radiant, and their faces shall never be ashamed.
zh: 人仰望他，就有光彩， 他們的臉必不蒙羞。

en: This poor man cried, and the LORD heard him and saved him out of all his troubles.
zh: 我這困苦人呼求，耶和華就垂聽， 拯救我脫離一切患難。

en: The angel of the LORD encamps around those who fear him, and delivers them.
zh: 耶和華的使者，在敬畏他的人周圍紮營， 搭救他們。

en: Oh, taste and see that the LORD is good! Blessed is the man who takes refuge in him!
zh: 你們要親自體驗，就知道耶和華是美善的； 投靠他的人，都是有福的。

en: Oh, fear the LORD, you his saints, for those who fear him have no lack!
zh: 耶和華的聖民哪！你們要敬畏他， 因為敬畏他的一無所缺。

en: The young lions suffer want and hunger; but those who seek the LORD lack no good thing.
zh: 少壯獅子有時還缺食挨餓， 但尋求耶和華的，甚麼好處都不缺。

en: Come, O children, listen to me; I will teach you the fear of the LORD.
zh: 孩子們！你們要來聽我； 我要教導你們敬畏耶和華。

en: What man is there who desires life and loves many days, that he may see good?
zh: 誰喜愛生命， 愛慕長壽，享受美福，

en: Keep your tongue from evil and your lips from speaking deceit.
zh: 就應謹守舌頭，不出惡言， 嘴唇不說欺詐的話。

en: Turn away from evil and do good; seek peace and pursue it.
zh: 也要離惡行善， 尋找並追求和睦。

en: The eyes of the LORD are toward the righteous and his ears toward their cry.
zh: 耶和華的眼睛看顧義人， 他的耳朵垂聽他們的呼求。

en: The face of the LORD is against those who do evil, to cut off the memory of them from the earth.
zh: 耶和華的臉敵對作惡的人， 要把他們的名從世上除掉。

en: When the righteous cry for help, the LORD hears and delivers them out of all their troubles.
zh: 義人哀求，耶和華就垂聽， 搭救他們脫離一切患難，

en: The LORD is near to the brokenhearted and saves the crushed in spirit.
zh: 耶和華親近心中破碎的人， 拯救靈裡痛悔的人，

en: Many are the afflictions of the righteous, but the LORD delivers him out of them all.
zh: 義人雖有許多苦難， 但耶和華搭救他脫離這一切。

en: He keeps all his bones; not one of them is broken.
zh: 耶和華保全他一身的骨頭， 連一根也不容折斷。

en: Affliction will slay the wicked, and those who hate the righteous will be condemned.
zh: 惡人必被惡害死； 憎恨義人的，必被定罪。

en: The LORD redeems the life of his servants; none of those who take refuge in him will be condemned.
zh: 耶和華救贖他僕人的性命； 凡是投靠他的，必不被定罪。
